summary: Prepared a bounded publication plan for the global coherence cleanup chapter. The plan separates governance/evidence artifacts, coherence-scan source/test changes, inbox envelope publication, mutation-evidence residuals, and unrelated dirty work. No push or broad staging was performed.

publication_plan.governance_evidence_bundle: cleanup task specs, handoffs/reports, decisions, and lifecycle snapshot only
publication_plan.inbox_publication: separate narada inbox publish crossing; dry-run reports 200 pending envelope artifacts overall
publication_plan.mutation_evidence: separate admitted repair/publication; excluded from cleanup bundle because dirty set is broad and historical

tooling_residuals: narada publication prepare failed with spawnSync git ENOBUFS in the very dirty worktree.

Publication prepare likely needs bounded Git output handling for narrow include bundles in very dirty repositories.
